channels.name: ICANN Lookup
channels.purpose: Identify the sponsoring registrar and its published abuse contact.
channels.notes: Registrar Information can expose the registrar name, IANA ID, abuse email and abuse phone. Coverage varies for ccTLDs.

channels.name: Google Safe Browsing — phishing
channels.purpose: Report a page suspected of phishing or social engineering.
channels.notes: Use the exact page URL. Submission is manual and remains subject to Google's review.

channels.name: Google Safe Browsing — malware
channels.purpose: Report a page suspected of distributing malware or unwanted software.
channels.notes: Choose this channel for observed malware or unwanted-software behavior, not ordinary impersonation alone.

channels.name: Microsoft Security Intelligence — unsafe site
channels.purpose: Submit one or more unsafe URLs for Microsoft review.
channels.notes: Microsoft states that corporate account holders can report multiple URLs in one submission.

channels.name: PHAROS — France
channels.purpose: Report potentially illegal internet content to French authorities.
channels.notes: PHAROS is not an emergency service. The operator must decide whether the observed content falls within the official scope.
